raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased multiple XXXX power drills through the buying agent XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. I never received any of the merchandise all items remain in their warehouse in XXXX. 
Their own warehouse videos clearly show dangerous counterfeits ( 200W instead of 400W, spray-painted bodies, no grounding wire risk of electrocution and death ). 
I requested full refunds multiple times, but they refused and only offered partial refunds. I have filed a police report ( Case # XXXX ) with the XXXX XXXX XXXX Sheriff Office and multiple chargebacks with Barclays. Barclays has closed many of my disputes without proper resolution. 
I request a full refund of all amounts paid, including foreign transaction fees, for every order.
